# Task Completion Template

## Purpose
Standard structure for `TASK-<ID>-COMPLETION.md` reports written after
major implementation work.

## Maintenance
- Update only if the completion report structure itself changes.

---

## Filename
`docs/completions/TASK-<ID>-COMPLETION.md`

## Template

```md
# TASK-<ID> — <Title> — Completion Report

## Overview
Short summary of what was built and why.

## Technical decisions made
- Decision 1 — rationale
- Decision 2 — rationale

## File structure
List of added / changed files.

## Known issues
- Issue 1
- Issue 2

## Tech debt
- Debt item 1
- Debt item 2

## Lessons learned
- Lesson 1
- Lesson 2
```
